name: Composite-Bench
description: Composite Research's long-horizon browser-based computer-use benchmark, grounded in real professional trajectories from its enterprise products: macro success rate (pass@1 exact match to certified-optimal solutions) over 100 hidden enterprise-work tasks across five slices — 7-day pipeline stewardship, rulebook extraction, entity deduplication, orienteering, adaptive information-gathering — under a pinned maximum-reasoning-effort compute contract (announced 300k-output-token episode budget, 110-step cap, anytime scoring, zero exclusions).
